title: Overhead Pastel Bedroom Lifestyle Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Overhead Pastel Bedroom Lifestyle Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Tasteful overhead pastel bedroom lifestyle portrait of adult East Asian woman with long straight black hair and subtle pink highlights, built around lazy weekend morning softness and cozy bed styling. Subject: adult East Asian woman with long straight black hair and subtle pink highlights wears white ribbed cotton camisole with front buttons and lace trim paired with light pink satin pajama shorts with silver charm bracelet on the left wrist; the mood stays relaxed, adult, intimate, and non-explicit. Scene: pastel purple pillows, white blanket with subtle purple floral pattern, and soft weekend-morning bedding fills the frame with ruffled pastel pillows, soft blankets, small lifestyle details, and a clean calm bedroom atmosphere. Composition: Slightly tilted high-angle overhead photo looking down at the bed; lying on her back with right arm behind her head, left knee gently bent, gaze softly up into the camera; hair spreads naturally on the pillow and the bedding frames the subject without clutter. Signature Elements: Preserved overhead pastel bedroom lifestyle portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-realistic lifestyle editorial photography with iPhone-like intimacy refined into high-resolution polish, natural skin texture, soft East Asian-inspired beauty styling where relevant, and cozy pastel visual softness. Color Palette: Pastel purple, white, light pink, soft lavender, natural skin tones, silver accessory highlights, and low-saturation bedroom neutrals. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Overhead lifestyle camera from a slightly tilted high angle, close enough for emotion and styling detail while preserving full bed context. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Tasteful overhead pastel bedroom lifestyle portrait of adult woman with auburn shoulder-length hair and soft natural makeup, built around lazy weekend morning softness and cozy bed styling.
